description: This file contains the Kotlin class AuthManager, which manages authentication tokens, including login, logout, token refresh, and locking of the app for biometric re-authentication.

classes.name: AuthManager
classes.description: A class to handle authentication, token management, and app lock state in an Android Kotlin app.

methods.name: isLoggedIn
methods.description: Checks if a user is currently logged in by verifying stored tokens.

methods.name: currentTokens
methods.description: Returns the current stored tokens if available.

methods.name: lockApp
methods.description: Locks the app requiring re-authentication to continue.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Performs a demo login, generating and storing tokens.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Clears stored tokens and unlocks the app.

methods.name: isAccessTokenExpired
methods.description: Checks if the current access token has expired, considering a buffer time.

methods.name: getValidAccessToken
methods.description: Ensures that a valid access token is available, performing refresh if necessary.

methods.name: refreshAccessToken
methods.description: Performs a demo refresh of the access token, rotating tokens and extending expiry.
